_comment: DEMO / FAKE therapist data for the website-fill engine. Fictional person, fictional practice, placeholder license numbers and contact info. Second fixture: couples-focused, IN-NETWORK, single-state, NO branded method, NO structured career array (exercises the career_history string fallback, the in-network FAQ/fees branches, the EFT+Gottman catalog, and the single-state options list). Not a real clinician; do not contact.
tagline: Couples work that helps you turn toward each other again.
signature_method_name: None — the no-LLM floor presents a generic, evidence-informed couples process (EFT and Gottman-informed); a branded method would be authored only with LLM enrichment.
education: MS in Marriage and Family Therapy, The Ohio State University, 2011
superbill_policy: In-network claims are filed directly with your insurer; an itemized superbill is available on request.
sliding_scale_policy: A limited number of reduced-fee slots are reserved for couples facing financial strain and fill quickly.
hero_video_alt: A couple walking together along a river at dusk
background_summary: more than a decade across university counseling, community family services, and private couples work
career_history: 2011-2015 university counseling center (couples and family therapist); 2015-2019 community family services agency (clinical supervisor); 2019-present founded Riverbend Couples Therapy
ai_disclosure: Created with AI assistance from Shaula. Reviewed and approved by Dana Okafor, LMFT before publication.
